Cui Shujing wants to use Jin Yingxin’s skills to achieve success and secure the position of the company’s chief director, so she again forces Li Duojing to ask Jin Yingxin for the braised ribs recipe.

programme.title: The Treasured Voice S6 - EP 7

Featuring artistes such as Jane Zhang, Zhang Bi Chen, David Tao, Liu Yu Ning, A-Lin etc.

programme.title: Captive Heart - EP 5
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Wu LaCai tries to kill FanXuan. WanLe helps her injured brother escape and a disappointed FanXuan mistrusts her even more. A spiteful Wu LaCai pushes WanLe into the river.

programme.title: Captive Heart - EP 6
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Disappointed that no investigation was done on WeiYun, an angry FanXuan publicly questions WeiYun and is thrown into jail.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 89
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: The Tale Of Nokdu - EP 12
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Quan Ludou encounters someone at the swing where he used to play with Dong Dongzhu, not realizing that the person is the king.

programme.desc: Derry broke up with Vina after they had a fight and misunderstanding. Derry, who was now closer to Elsa, helped Elsa sell roasted corn. According to Derry's father, the hotel's image would be damaged if Derry remained with Elsa and helped Elsa sell roasted corn.

programme.title: Anti Galau Bukan Sulap Bukan Mejik
programme.desc: Satga was very wasteful and made his mother angry with him. So Satga was kicked out of the house by his own mother. Satga was confused and unable to access his wealth. Satga was standing on the side of the road when suddenly a criminal hypnotized him, convincing Satga's subconscious that he was a poor man. programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day, while Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend, Rangga (Joshua Otay), with another woman. Dania was shocked, not expecting her boyfriend to be cheating on her with another woman behind her back. Afterward, Dania reflected alone in a park. She said she wished someone had given her a hug when she was so vulnerable.

Traveling to a different region across Indonesia each month, the grand roadshow brings together SCTV's elite stars—ranging from top soap opera actors and magicians to renowned singers—masterfully blending mainstream entertainment with the unique cultural heritage of each local city it visits.

programme.title: Horang Kaya Dengan Kearifan Cinta Lokalnya
programme.desc: Maya's (Jennifer Eve) family suddenly receives a windfall, becoming wealthy and wealthy. Maya's father, wanting a comfortable new home for his family, decides to buy a luxury home. Meanwhile, Aryan (Fauzan Nasrul), a young man, has just returned to Indonesia from abroad. Upon arriving home, he is shocked to discover that his house has become Maya's family's. A dispute ensues between Aryan and Maya's family.

programme.title: Gara Gara Gecko No Jomblo Jomblo
programme.desc: A beautiful girl (Nabila Zavira) has a phobia of geckos. That day, a gecko fell on her, but she doesn't believe in superstition and will still go to Jakarta, even though her mother forbids it. However, upon arriving in Jakarta, the girl meets a boss (Rizky Alatas) who has a pet reptile named Gecko. From there, the girl works around while looking after Gecko. Unfortunately, when the girl looks for Gecko in the cashier's drawer, she is suspected of stealing.

programme.title: Mudik Jangan Bawa Hati Nanti Sulit Kembali
programme.desc: Intan and her colleague Dodo were entrusted with a luxury car that someone left at their office for two weeks. Intan and Dodo then planned to take the car back to their hometown, or “mudik.” Dodo pretended to be Intan's driver in her hometown. Intan claimed to be wealthy. On the other hand, Dodo claimed to be the car's owner and flirted with the girls in the village, even though he was actually a car mechanic.

programme.title: JODOH GAK ADA YANG TEMPE
programme.desc: Maura and Theo's first meeting was indeed very annoying, but how exciting is their story?

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 11
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Cinta Tak Perlu Dibagi Jangan Ya Dek Ya
programme.desc: Driven by a secret mission to reclaim her family's lost plantation from the powerful Pak Hendra, Rina (Jennifer Eve) infiltrates his wealthy household in Jakarta. Using her charm and polite demeanor, she successfully captures the hearts of Hendra's two sons, Damar (Royano Kevin) and Nando (Masaji Wijayanto). While a genuine romance sparks between Rina and Nando, a massive family rift explodes when Damar confesses his own feelings, leading to a catastrophic event that shatters Rina's relationship

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 37
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 183
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ARJUNA CINTANYA GAK PERNAH BERCHANDYA
programme.desc: Ayu (Nabila Zavira) already has a boyfriend, but her father, who loves Javanese puppetry, doesn't like her boyfriend. Then, Ayu meets a handsome young man wearing an Anoman costume, but Ayu thinks he's playing a trick on her. It turns out that while she's undergoing training for a teacher promotion, Ayu meets the young man who loves Javanese art again, and their suitcases even get swapped.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 11

programme.title: Jadian Sama Cewek Duren ACC Sayang
programme.desc: Ken (Cakrawala Airawan) harbors a severe phobia of durians; the mere smell of the fruit leaves him nauseous or completely unconscious. In a cruel twist of fate, he is forced to deal with Ulfa (Shanice Margaretha), the daughter of a wealthy durian plantation tycoon. Repelled by her family's trade, Ken vows to stay as far away from Ulfa as humanly possible.

programme.title: AKU TERPISANG PISANG PADA PANDANGAN PERTAMA
programme.desc: Thomas (Lucky Perdana) nearly gets into a terrible accident due to Nadya’s (Shanice Margaretha) reckless driving as she speeds down the road in a banana cargo truck. To his absolute horror, Thomas later discovers that Nadya is the primary banana supplier for his mother’s bakery business. Furious about the roadside encounter, Thomas demands his mother cut all professional ties with the dangerous driver

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 184

programme.title: Aku Terlalu Sah Buat Kamu Yang Gelisah
programme.desc: Rangga (Hardi Fadhillah) is completely miserable and unable to move on after being dumped by his girlfriend. Haunted by memories of his ex, he hires Rara (Ina Marika), a professional relationship consultant, to help him erase his past. However, despite her best strategies and efforts, Rangga's stubborn heart refuses to cooperate, making him Rara's toughest case yet

programme.title: Romantika Cinta Jangan Ya Dek Ya
programme.desc: The arrival of a beautiful new teacher, Intan (Larasati Nugroho), instantly captivates a young student named Ferdi (Dimas Putra). Ferdi's older brother, Fahmi (El Ryan Carlen)—who also teaches at the school—strictly forbids the crush, arguing that Ferdi is far too young. However, as Fahmi and Intan are continuously paired up for school projects, they genuinely fall for each other, igniting a furious sibling rivalry as Ferdi accuses his brother of betrayal.

programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Romantika Cinta Jangan Ya Dek Ya
programme.desc: The arrival of a beautiful new teacher, Intan (Larasati Nugroho), instantly captivates a young student named Ferdi (Dimas Putra). Ferdi's older brother, Fahmi (El Ryan Carlen)—who also teaches at the school—strictly forbids the crush, arguing that Ferdi is far too young. However, as Fahmi and Intan are continuously paired up for school projects, they genuinely fall for each other, igniting a furious sibling rivalry as Ferdi accuses his brother of betrayal.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 38
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 184
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Aku Terlalu Sah Buat Kamu Yang Gelisah
programme.desc: Rangga (Hardi Fadhillah) is completely miserable and unable to move on after being dumped by his girlfriend. Haunted by memories of his ex, he hires Rara (Ina Marika), a professional relationship consultant, to help him erase his past. However, despite her best strategies and efforts, Rangga's stubborn heart refuses to cooperate, making him Rara's toughest case yet

programme.title: JODOH GAK ADA YANG TEMPE
programme.desc: Maura and Theo's first meeting was indeed very annoying, but how exciting is their story?

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 12
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Cinta Tak Perlu Dibagi Jangan Ya Dek Ya
programme.desc: Driven by a secret mission to reclaim her family's lost plantation from the powerful Pak Hendra, Rina (Jennifer Eve) infiltrates his wealthy household in Jakarta. Using her charm and polite demeanor, she successfully captures the hearts of Hendra's two sons, Damar (Royano Kevin) and Nando (Masaji Wijayanto). While a genuine romance sparks between Rina and Nando, a massive family rift explodes when Damar confesses his own feelings, leading to a catastrophic event that shatters Rina's relationship

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 38
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: ARJUNA CINTANYA GAK PERNAH BERCHANDYA
programme.desc: Ayu (Nabila Zavira) already has a boyfriend, but her father, who loves Javanese puppetry, doesn't like her boyfriend. Then, Ayu meets a handsome young man wearing an Anoman costume, but Ayu thinks he's playing a trick on her. It turns out that while she's undergoing training for a teacher promotion, Ayu meets the young man who loves Javanese art again, and their suitcases even get swapped.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 185
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Cinta Sat Set Dikejar Target Biar Mencapai Omset
programme.desc: Just days before her highly anticipated wedding to Reno (Kevin Hillers), Sheila (Aliyah Faizah) suddenly panics and runs away. Desperate to avoid a family scandal, her mother pressures her younger sister, Meisya (Amanda Salmakhira), to put on the dress and take her place at the altar. Meisya fiercely rejects the absurd idea, finding an unlikely ally in Reno, who insists he will only marry the woman who left him

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 13
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. programme.title: Lengah Dikit Langsung Diangkut Cintamu
programme.desc: Fathiya (Ina Marika) makes a living selling football jerseys on the sidewalk, constantly playing a high-stakes game of hide-and-seek with municipal police (Satpol PP) raids. During a frantic chase, a panicking Fathiya throws her massive bag of merchandise through an open car window into the arms of a stranger named Ridho (Cakrawala Airawan). The sudden move leaves the bewildered Ridho pinned by the officers, who drag him to the station despite his desperate pleas that the illegal goods aren't hi

programme.title: Melukis Senja - EP 7
programme.desc: Cinta segi tiga remaja sekolah menengah yang rumit dengan masalah keluarga dan rahsia besar dari masa lalu.

programme.title: Onyomat Geset Go - EP 10
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan game show untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 25
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 36
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Siti Ooo Som - EP 1
programme.desc: Program berbentuk permainan yang akan mempertandingkan dua kumpulan selebriti dalam pelbagai acara dan dihoskan oleh Dato' Siti Nurhaliza.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 15
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang ibu tunggal, Mak Jah dan kisah kehidupannya bersama lapan orang anaknya yang sudah dewasa.

programme.title: Cik Serba Tahu - EP 8
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: Biniku Ninja - EP 24
programme.desc: Azlan berasal dari keluarga susah yang akhirnya berjaya merantau ke UK setelah mendapat tawaran menyambung ijazah dalam aliran seni. Kisah bermula apabila beliau berjumpa dengan seorang gadis

programme.title: Sembang Teh Tarik S3 - EP 8
programme.desc: Sembang Teh Tarik yang dikendalikan Datuk AC Mizal ia merupakan program 'talk show' yang terbaru dan santai sesuai untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Spontan - EP 3
programme.desc: Komedi yang dipentaskan oleh gabungan pelawak tanahair menampilkan pelbagai isu berkaitan kesilapan yang sering berlaku dalam kehidupan seharian kita.

programme.title: Joras & Stars - EP 1
programme.desc: Joras & Stars ialah sketsa yang menampilkan artis jemputan setiap minggu untuk menghiburkan penonton melalui sketsa yang kelakar.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 1
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Yak Yak Yey - EP 5
programme.desc: Himpunan sketsa komedi pendek pecah perut yang menggabungkan selebriti tanah air terdiri daripada pelawak,pelakon,penyanyi dan pempengaruh media sosial .

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu - EP 9
programme.desc: Jep, Shuib, Rahim & Pakya akan bersembang di Warung sepahtu bersama tetamu undangan mereka.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagho - EP 11
programme.desc: Istimewa bersama pakar motivasi Samsul Debat dan barisan pelawak, saksikan mereka berkongsi kisah menarik dan lucu bersama penonton.

programme.title: Berita Hangit - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Arena Panggang - EP 6
programme.desc: Siapakah yang paling handal memanggang dan siapakah yang bakal dipanggang?

programme.desc: Kiah membina kumpulan baru untuk menguruskan perniagaan Ikan Pekasamnya,dia juga dilatih dan dilantik menjadi seorang ejen rahsia.

programme.title: Elak Elak - EP 1

programme.desc: Jep dan Judin adik-beradik tiri yang lurus bendul meminati sukan bermotor. Jep mahu jadi Johan Rempit dan Judin mahu menolongnya mencapai mimpi itu. [Episod ini tamat tempoh pada 21/11/13]

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 12
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Layan Je Super Spontan - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Komediri With Douglas Lim - EP 3

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Mega 2019 - EP 11
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi yang penuh gelak tawa untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Berita Hangit - EP 9

programme.title: The Cadets - EP 4
programme.desc: Mengisahkan perjuangan empat sekawan - Amir, Farah, Hakim dan Liz - untuk membuktikan bahawa pasukan mereka mampu mengatasi segala cabaran untuk mewakili Kadet bomba di Kem Jamboree Kebangsaan.

programme.title: Gerak Geri GenZ - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah eksplorasi 4 sahabat remaja perempuan Cik B, Ara, Alyssa dan Qadejah di Turki. Mereka menelusuri kota bersejarah dan budaya.

programme.title: The Chosen One 2024 - EP 4
programme.desc: Saksikan kehebatan bakat-bakat muda yang akan mempersembahkan nyanyian terbaik mereka di bawah bimbingan barisan penyanyi terkemuka tanahair sebagai coach!

programme.title: Hikayat Bawang Putih Bawang Merah - EP 4
programme.desc: Bawang Putih tinggal bersama ibu tiri dan adik tiri dan setiap hari didera. Putih melarikan diri dan bertembung dengan Putera rupawan di dalam hutan Inderaloka.

programme.title: Travel Lawak - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah program travelog yang menampilkan tiga pelawak popular iaitu Syuk, Sharif Zero dan Mamak Puteh di mana mereka akan mengembara ke luar negara dan meneroka sendiri budaya dan tempat-tempat menarik.

programme.title: Prankap Show - EP 7

programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan bual bicara yang menampilkan pelawak-pelawak terkenal Malaysia dan dihoskan oleh Hans Isaac.

programme.title: RI-OH RIMBA - EP 4
programme.desc: Amir Sisi cabar Hawa, Putera, Ikhmal dan Atu buat cabaran di Kampung Orang Asli?! Macam mana agaknya reaksi mereka dalam Rioh Rimba ni?!

programme.title: Jutawan Ekspres - EP 4
programme.desc: Keluarga miskin berpindah ke kejiranan kaya selepas menjadi jutawan serta merta. Masing-masing cuba untuk hidup sebagai 'orang kaya' mengikut cara mereka sendiri.

programme.title: Man Laksa
programme.desc: Man Laksa, pemuda yang pemalu menjalani hidup sederhana dengan menjual laksa di kampungnya. Dia menaruh hati pada gadis bernama Chah, namun tidak berbuat apa-apa kerana Chah adalah anak ketua kampung.

programme.title: Travel Lawak - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah program travelog yang menampilkan tiga pelawak popular iaitu Syuk, Sharif Zero dan Mamak Puteh di mana mereka akan mengembara ke luar negara dan meneroka sendiri budaya dan tempat-tempat menarik.

programme.title: Prankap Show - EP 8
programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular merancang "prank" bersama geng mereka dan mengenakan mangsa terpilih. Berjayakan perancangan "prank" mereka? Sama-sama kita nantikan!

programme.title: baikpunya - EP 3
programme.desc: Program ini akan membawa anda dalam perjalanan untuk mengetahui tempat-tempat tersembunyi dan tempat-tempat popular di Malaysia yang disyorkan oleh penduduk tempatan.

programme.title: The Maid 2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Suhana, Nadia, dan Fika baru saja diceraikan Jay. Harta mereka telah berpindah milik kepada Jay setelah Jay berjaya pedayakan mereka tandatangani surat yang mereka tidak tahu pun isi kandungannya.

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 5
programme.desc: Ikmal merasa sedikit cemburu apabila merasakan Mikail semakin mesra dengan Mawar. Mikail masih cuba merahsiakan tempat dia bekerja daripada pengetahuan Ikmal. Raihana tidak dapat berjumpa dengan Ikmal.

programme.title: Sepenggal Puisi - EP 8
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang konflik 2 buah keluarga, satu di Yogyakarta dan satu di Kuala Lumpur. Rahsia yang di simpan selama 30 tahun terbongkar apabila Fariz ke Yogyakarta untuk mendapatkan kepastian.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 7
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 10
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: DramaVaganza: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 25
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Gen F - EP 8
programme.desc: 12 pereka fesyen terpilih dari Malaysia, Indonesia dan Singapura akan bersaing setiap minggu untuk menghasilkan rekaan terbaik mereka.

programme.title: Kampung Boy S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Nikmati animasi terbaik hasil nukilan Dato' Lat yang penuh kreatif lagi menghiburkan ini istimewa untuk tontonan anda sekeluarga!

programme.title: Hard to Heart S3 - EP 10
programme.desc: Program temubual bersama artis tersohor, mengenai jatuh bangun mereka dalam sepanjang terbabit dengan kerjaya seni tempatan.

programme.title: Maskulin: Who's Your Bro - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan realiti kecergasan penuh adrenalin yang mendefinisikan persaudaraan lelaki! 12 peserta dari pelbagai latar belakang akan berdepan cabaran fizikal dan emosi serta pemikiran strategik.

programme.title: Murder By Moonlight - EP 1
programme.desc: Malam sebelum PKP pertama, hotel memutuskan untuk mengadakan parti untuk tetamu yang ada. Ada banyak drama yang diperhatikan semasa parti itu.

programme.title: Murder By Moonlight - EP 2
programme.desc: Bella dan Julia tiba di hotel dengan identiti palsu. Pada masa yang sama, Ameera mula menyiasat kematian Tuan Osman. Di samping itu, Jit, Sangeetha dan Datuk Karnain juga sangat mencurigakan!

programme.title: Murder By Moonlight - EP 3
programme.desc: Sangeetha mempunyai motif tetapi tidak ingat apa yang berlaku pada malam Tuan Osman meninggal. Semasa dia cuba ingat kembali, Ameera pula sedang mendalami penyiasatannya sendiri.

programme.title: Murder By Moonlight - EP 4
programme.desc: Ben dan Mindy pergi ke dalam hutan untuk mencari seorang Penunggu? Dato Karnain dan Datin Saloma ikut untuk memastikan mereka tidak menipu.

programme.title: Perang Jantina - EP 6

programme.title: Next To Neelofa - EP 1

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 4

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 5

programme.title: Awarapan
programme.desc: Shivam, a hitman, is asked to keep an eye on his boss's mistress. However, he soon learns that she has been a victim of sex trafficking and decides to unite her with her lover. Release Year: 2007 Director: Mohit Suri

programme.title: Do Lafzon Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Centered on ex-mixed martial arts artist Sooraj and sculptor artist Jenny. Their fate intertwines when their past are revealed in their relationship. Release Year: 2016 Director: Deepak Tijori

programme.title: Shaadi Se Pehle
programme.desc: Ashish is head over heels for Rani, but her parents aren't having it because he's unemployed. Everything changes when he lands a job, winning their approval at last! Release Year: 2006 Director: Satish Kaushik

programme.title: Saajan Ki Baahon Mein
programme.desc: Sagar is ready to marry Kavita when he meets Sapna, his former love who is set to marry his childhood friend and life-changing facts surface. Release Year: 1995 Director: Jayprakkash Shaw

programme.title: Entertainment
programme.desc: Akhil Akshay Kumar finds out that he is the heir of 300 million. However, his life goes Topsy-turvy when he learns that the empire goes to Entertainment a dog. 2014. Release Year: 2014 Director: Sajid, Farhad Awards: 2014 Winner Reader's Choice- Best Actor in a Negative Role- Sonu Sood

programme.title: Chaalbaaz
programme.desc: Twins separated at birth swap lives by accident. One faces harsh village realities, while the other plots revenge against a cruel relative who ruined his past. Release Year: 1989 Director: Pankaj Parashar Awards: 1990 WinnerFilmfare Award- Best ActreSS- Sridevi, 1990 WinnerFilmfare Award- Best Choreography- Saroj Khan

programme.title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai!

programme.title: Kevine Et Fortune

programme.title: Gracia, La Messi De Bangui
programme.desc: At 18, Gracia has a dream: to become a footballer. Her passion puts her in constant conflict with those around her, women's football is still a controversial subject in the Central African Republic. Girls like her are called ''Koli-Wali'' (tomboys). But Gracia doesn't care, she just wants to play.

programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 47
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine - EP 12
programme.desc: The lively wolves' team confronts a more sedate but very well-organised tortoise team in the sitting volleyball competition.

programme.title: Belfort Et Lupin - EP 9
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 54
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 35
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 45
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Foot Go - EP 5
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

programme.title: Marocains Du Ciel - EP 5
programme.desc: Abdelwahed tells his daughter the story of the sage Abbas Ibn Firnas. Despite the obstacles he encountered on his path, he never gave up or allowed others to tarnish his reputation.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: L'echappee Belge - EP 5
programme.desc: Host Zoe Brunet and Adrien cross the Tarentaise by mountain bike and kayak. From Val d'Isere to Bourg-Saint-Maurice, they criss-cross the Vanoise National Park in a sumptuous Alpine setting.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 11
programme.desc: Sourdough breads, brioches and generous recipes are the keys to his success on social networks. A father and inspiring creator, he turns a childhood passion into a space for emancipation.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 92
programme.desc: She's French, world champion and Olympic champion in windsurfing, multiple European champion: Charline Picon is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F - EP 15

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'aventures - EP 8
programme.desc: In France, Nathalie Lasselin welcomes cave diving enthusiasts. Together they explore an abandoned limestone quarry in Saint-Meme-les-Carrieres, before discovering the famous Le Ressel cave. Renowned for its incredible network of underground karst passages, the Lot is one of the world's leading areas for cave diving.

programme.title: Peaux Noires : Quel Heritage ? - EP 4
programme.desc: What intimate and social relationship do Black French-speaking people have with their skin color? Through personal testimonies, expert contributions and innovative visual staging, the series explores the historical and cultural evolution of the representation of Black skin.

programme.title: Tendance Xxi

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 14

programme.title: Movie - Aasal
programme.desc: Two brothers envy their step-brother Shiva as he is their father's favourite. Since their plan to deal in drugs and arms is opposed by Shiva, the two brothers hatch a devious plan to bump him off.

programme.title: Movie - Sevarkodi
programme.desc: Kali agrees to get his sister Valli married to the rich but old Annachi for his money. However, Valli elopes with Bala, her lover. Infuriated, Kali swears revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Sindanai Sei
programme.desc: Aadhi meets his childhood friends in the city who too struggle to make both ends meet. Together, they successfully execute a bank robbery. But they get killed one after the other after the robbery.

programme.title: Movie - Pongalo Pongal

programme.title: Movie - Aanai
programme.desc: A police officer is suspended despite his honesty. Now, he serves as bodyguard to the daughter of a singer. When the girl is kidnapped, the bodyguard is suspected, lest he proves his innocence.

programme.title: Movie - MR.Bharath
programme.desc: Businessman Gopinath abandons Shanti, his first love, to marry a rich heiress. Later, Bharath, Gopinath and Shanti's illegitimate son, seeks revenge from him for the injustice meted out to his mother.

programme.title: Movie - Ambasamuthiram Ambani
programme.desc: A poor guy meets a girl who falls for him but he is more focused on achieving his dreams. He buys a plot that is under construction, for his supermarket. However, before he can take it over, the owner dies and things take a turn.

programme.title: Movie - Surya Vamsam

programme.title: Movie - Billa II
programme.desc: David Billa works for Abbasi, a famous mobster in Goa. Due to a difference of opinion, Abbasi turns against David, and eventually gets killed by him. David must handle the situation carefully.

programme.desc: A rich young woman is madly in love with a manager. But things turn difficult for them after their families disapprove of their relationship.

programme.title: PGA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Travelers Championship is a professional golf tournament on the PGA Tour in Cromwell, Connecticut, a suburb south of Hartford. Since 1984 the tournament has been held at TPC River Highlands. The tournament was founded 73 years ago in 1952. Over the last decade, longer hitters have done well at the tournament, with Stewart Cink, Hunter Mahan, J. J. Henry, Phil Mickelson, and Bubba Watson combining for six victories over a 10-year span.

programme.title: DP World Tour 2026 Open d'Italia Day 3
programme.desc: The Italian Open is the men's national open golf championship of Italy. It was founded in 1925. The format of the Italian Open is a standard stroke play event played over 72 holes with a cut after 36 holes. The last Italian man to win his national championship is Francesco Molinari, who did so in 2006 and 2016, but he is the only local winner since 1980.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 2
programme.desc: Tim Howard spent a decade as Everton's first choice goalkeeper, the club that defined his Premier League career. The American recalls his journey from New Jersey, via Old Trafford, to Goodison Park, and his most memorable moments between the posts.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 40
programme.desc: Tyler Adams' story is one of dedication, commitment and sacrifice. From the early days when his mother would drive him hundreds of miles to training to pursue a dream, to the influence of his stepfather and three brothers, Adams' journey from MLS prospect to Premier League star has been a fascinating one. programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history. Through iconic matches and unforgettable characters, we capture what this

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Soaring Seagulls' tells the incredible story of Brighton & Hove Albion; from the brink of collapse and years in the lower leagues to becoming one of the Premier League's smartest and most admired clubs. Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. Best known for his time at West Ham United, Dicks looks back on the highs, rivalries and intensity of football in the 1990s, as well as the reputation that made him a cult hero with fans. Now coaching at Chelmsford City, we see a different side to the former hardman as he passes on his experience to the next generation, while reflecting on the moment

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 25 NOV
programme.desc: Review covers all the action from Matchweek 12, kicking off with Burnley hosting Chelsea, Liverpool taking on Forest, and then for the game of the weekend, we look to North London as Arsenal face-off against Spurs.

From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham. He also opens up about the terrifying plane incident in 1998 that near

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way. Through exclusive interview

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. Best known for his time at West Ham United, Dicks looks back on the highs, rivalries and intensity of football in the 1990s, as well as the reputation that made him a cult hero with fans. Now coaching at Chelmsford City, we see a different side to the former hardman as he passes on his experience to the next generation, while reflecting on the moment

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Soaring Seagulls' tells the incredible story of Brighton & Hove Albion; from the brink of collapse and years in the lower leagues to becoming one of the Premier League's smartest and most admired clubs. Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 5
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Rodri, Viktor Gyökeres, Chris Wood and Daniel Munoz.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 2
programme.desc: Tim Howard spent a decade as Everton's first choice goalkeeper, the club that defined his Premier League career. The American recalls his journey from New Jersey, via Old Trafford, to Goodison Park, and his most memorable moments between the posts.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 5
programme.desc: Premier League legend Tim Howard takes on the ultimate challenge, ranking the 10 greatest US players to play in the Premier League. But there's a twist; from his carefully selected list, he must crown one as the Ultimate Premier League USA GOAT.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 40
programme.desc: Tyler Adams' story is one of dedication, commitment and sacrifice. From the early days when his mother would drive him hundreds of miles to training to pursue a dream, to the influence of his stepfather and three brothers, Adams' journey from MLS prospect to Premier League star has been a fascinating one. This week, the Bournemouth midfielder discusses his path and identity, fleeing the nest to realise his ambitions before reflecting on another incredible season on the South Coast and looking ah

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE DUTCH MASTERS
programme.desc: A high-energy hour showcasing legendary Dutch footballers, including Ruud Gullit, Edwin van der Sar, George Boateng, Mario Melchiot, Jaap Stam and more.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 5
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. programme.title: PL MASTERCLASS - EP 2
programme.desc: Some of the Premier League's biggest stars take us onto the pitch to discuss the techniques and thought processes that allow them to perform at the highest level. Featuring Danny Welbeck, Jean-Philippe Mateta, Everton Goals Recreated and Jorrel Hato.

programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. programme.title: Liverpool vs Bournemouth (MW01) - EP 1
programme.desc: Liverpool are unbeaten on the opening day in the last 12 PL seasons (W9, D3) - the longest ongoing run in PL.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Burnley (MW03) - EP 23
programme.desc: Manchester United have lost just one of their last 25 home games against Burnley in all competitions (W15 D9), going down 2-0 in January 2020.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Chelsea (MW02) - EP 11
programme.desc: Chelsea have won five of their last seven Premier League meetings with West Ham United (D1 L1), and overall have 32 wins in the competition against the Hammers, only beating Spurs more often (37).

programme.title: Manchester City vs Burnley (MW06) - EP 55
programme.desc: Burnley are winless in their last 19 league visits to Manchester City (D6 L13) since a 5-2 win in March 1963. The Clarets have lost each of their last seven Premier League games at the Etihad Stadium.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Leeds United (MW02) - EP 16
programme.desc: Arsenal are unbeaten in their last 14 meetings with Leeds in all competitions (W12 D2), winning each of the last six in a row.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Liverpool (MW02) - EP 20
programme.desc: Newcastle haven’t scored in any of their last four Premier League matches without Alexander Isak featuring (D2 L2), having 47 shots and accumulating an xG of 5.57 without scoring in these games.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Bournemouth (MW08) - EP 74
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo has scored (10) or assisted (4) 14 of Bournemouth’s last 18 Premier League goals (78%). Since the start of this period (14th April), this is at least three more goal involvements than any other player in the division.

programme.title: Everton vs Newcastle United (MW13) - EP 124
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last four Premier League games against Everton (D2 L2), having won five of their previous six against the Toffees (L1).

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Manchester United (MW15) - EP 150
programme.desc: Wolves did the Premier League double over Manchester United last season, as many victories as they’d managed in their previous 14 against the Red Devils (W2 D3 L9).

programme.title: Manchester City vs Leeds United (MW13) - EP 122
programme.desc: Manchester City have won 23 of their last 25 Premier League games against promoted sides (D2), with their last such defeat coming at home to Leeds in April 2021.

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Aston Villa (MW14) - EP 135
programme.desc: Brighton have won just one of their last nine Premier League games against Aston Villa (D2 L6), a 1-0 home win in May 2024.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Tottenham Hotspur (MW12) - EP 119
programme.desc: Arsenal have won five of their last six Premier League games against Tottenham (D1), including the last three in a row. It’s their longest winning run against Spurs since a five game stretch between January 1987 and January 1989.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Brighton and Hove Albion (MW09) - EP 84
programme.desc: Brighton have won each of their last three Premier League away games against Manchester United – the last side to win more consecutive league visits to Old Trafford were Manchester City between 1968 and 1972 (5).

programme.title: West Ham United vs Aston Villa (MW16) - EP 158
programme.desc: West Ham are winless in their last five Premier League games against Aston Villa (D3 L2), having won five in a row against them before that.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Aston Villa (MW19) - EP 185
programme.desc: Aston Villa are only team to beat Arsenal 3 times in PL since start of 23-24 (3 of Arsenal’s 11 PL defeats in total).

programme.title: Leeds United vs Liverpool (MW15) - EP 147
programme.desc: Leeds have won just one of their last 12 Premier League games against Liverpool (D3 L8), beating them 2-1 at Anfield in October 2022.

programme.title: Fulham vs Manchester City (MW14) - EP 132
programme.desc: Fulham have lost their last 18 meetings with Manchester City in all competitions, the longest losing run one side has had against another in English football history.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Bournemouth (MW16) - EP 160
programme.desc: Manchester United have lost just one of their last nine Premier League games (W5 D3), going down 1-0 at home to Everton. They’ve won more points in these nine games (18) than they had in their previous 17 matches combined (16 – W4 D4 L9).

programme.title: FS MMA Tyler Jackson vs. Kyle Watson
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Tyler Jackson goes the distance with Kyle Watson for a three round affair in picturesque Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Edwin Rodriguez vs. Jason Escalera
programme.desc: This episode features a USBA super middleweight title bout that sees Edwin Rodriguez defend against the undefeated Jason Escalera.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode, we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Baku and the #2 world ranked fighter, Michael Korrell, talks judo.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Andre Berto vs. Freddy Hernandez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Andre Berto defend the WBC welterweight championship against Freddy Hernandez. With one quick, hard right hand to the face in the first round, this bout comes to a sudden halt. Berto looks to keep his undefeated streak alive and thrust himself into talks for bigger fights with the likes of stars such as Floyd Mayweather. Also on the card, Jean Pascal looks for an upset in the light heavyweight division.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 1 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Takakeisho, Onosho, Kotoshoho and Daieisho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Victor Ortiz vs. Marcos Rene Maidana
programme.desc: This episode features a Super Lightweight bloody battle between Marcos Rene Maidana making his US debut and a very young Victor Ortiz, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds. Directed by H

programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned. programme.title: Wide World of Fights Erik Morales vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: This episode features a Super Lightweight title bout that goes the full 12 rounds, between the unbeaten Danny Garcia and veteran Erik Morales, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Chris Arreola vs. Tomasz Adamek
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavyweight collision between Chris Arreola and Tomasz Adamek in a battle of one-loss competitors. Also on the card, Rocky Jearez takes on Jorge Barrios before a gruesome cut calls an end to the fight.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. Episode 2 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Terunofuji, Tobizaru, Ryuden and Tamawashi.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features ring girl Arianny Celeste making a high schooler's dreams come true when she goes as his date to his prom. Also, we catch up with Clay Guida and Urijah Faber at the LA Fit Expo and we go behind the scenes for an intimate photo shoot with beautiful ring girl Amber Nicole.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Cheyanne Vlismas vs. Karolina Wojcik
programme.desc: This episode features a Fight of the Night contest between strawweights Cheyanne 'The Warrior Princess' Vlismas and Karolina 'The Polish Assassin' Wojcik, both making their debut. This was a 3-round war with one fighter taking home the split decision victory. Bonus coverage includes Rodrique Kena vs. Sifiso Ngcobo.

This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 2 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Terunofuji, Tobizaru, Ryuden and Tamawashi.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features ring girl Arianny Celeste making a high schooler's dreams come true when she goes as his date to his prom. programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Cheyanne Vlismas vs. Karolina Wojcik

This was a 3-round war with one fighter taking home the split decision victory. Bonus coverage includes Rodrique Kena vs. Sifiso Ngcobo.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 75
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Laa‐Laa and Po pick delicious green beans. The Noo-­Noo puts the beans into the Tubby Custard Machine and out comes tasty, green Tubby Custard!

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 9
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'castle', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We visit lots of castles - tall and small castle, a sandcastle and a spooky castle - boo! We see Dee in a castle in the clouds and bouncing on a bouncy castle! And have you ever seen a banana castle before? The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Messy is having fun blowing loud notes through his horn, but whatever noise Messy is making, someone or something is making it too.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 46
programme.desc: It's secret agent time when Mojo and Bo think Didi the tractor is up to something fishy. But can the two supersecret spies follow her without being spotted?

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 46
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 20
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels have different ideas about what makes a good party. But the Squirrels have lots of ideas about what happens when the clock strikes twelve. Are they right?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: What is that awful noise coming from the Gulou Tower? It's Grandmaster Glitch dressed up as a Chinese Emperor singing of course! Go Jetters to the rescue!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 43
programme.desc: Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake, but first she must put away her toys. But nothing can tempt her to clean up, until Dad drops the cake.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 34
programme.desc: When Andy accidentally breaks a plaster cast of a ring tailed lemur's footprint that Mr Hammond made, it's up to Andy to put things right.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have a snail slime race. But who will win, Team King or Team Queen?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels are transported into the future where they encounter a robot version of Duggee - and a few other interesting changes to the clubhouse too!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 14
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn that friends can be like an extended family, earning their Family Photo Badges and a brilliant group picture in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 13
programme.desc: Tag's feeling grumpy because he didn't eat his breakfast, uh-oh! Luckily Duggee has his Breakfast Badge, and soon the Squirrels will too.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are watching for polar bears, but an iceberg is heading for their ship!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Glitch takes all of the colourful powder from the Festival of Colour in Dwarka, India. Can the Go Jetters get it back?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 16
programme.desc: A bit bored by her surroundings, Emily longs to go on a fun adventure and experience something new and exciting. It's not long before her wish is granted.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck try to help Donkey get his jumping confidence back by building a surprise for him in their back garden.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: The changeable weather means Rainbow has to leave before finishing his story. Sarah and Duck try to find out how the story ends.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Stanley and the children tour the museum and quickly realise there's nothing about them or their friends, so they make a new exhibit all about their town today!

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 26
programme.desc: There's a funny noise around town. It's distracting the children's music practice and keeping everyone else up. Stanley investigates with the help of Myrtle.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 11
programme.desc: From disco dancing frogs to skipping puffins and lions that love ballet, the talking animals discuss the best things about dancing.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 4
programme.desc: JoJo wants to go somewhere new, so Gran Gran takes her to see new places. JoJo realises that even when you think you know somewhere, there are always new places to discover.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 44
programme.desc: It is a rainy day in the clubhouse which means it's a perfect day for a board game. Duggee introduces the Squirrels to one of his favourite games, but it might be just a little bit too complex for them.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: After breaking the Chickens' TV aerial during the finale of their favourite soap opera, the Squirrels take it upon themselves to recreate the final episode for them. But will their performance impress the grumpy Chickens?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Glitch transform's Sydney's iconic Opera House into an opera boat for a race around the Australian city's harbour.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's tiny Brussels Sprout performing I'm Mighty and proving how great he is.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, Tomato changes colour.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Evil Pea's spa break is ruined when the Cobs try to trick Supertato while she's gone.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: It's Supertato's birthday, and Evil Pea shows up to his party with a big evil surprise.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, a bit exasperated, he explains that he was miming. They want to know what miming is, and Duggee fondly recalls his days as a young Parisian street performer. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 6
programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 9
programme.desc: The day starts when Duggee moves a cupboard, and the Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind it. It's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels aren't sure what a diary is, so Duggee explains by reading some extracts. The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 23
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 111
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa­Laa and Po have their favourite things. The bag, the hat, the scooter and the ball all magically swap places and become mixed up.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are back together like you've never seen them before!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want dad to play two different games, so dad tries to play both at the same time. While also watching the race on TV.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 17
programme.desc: Lorenzo decides to play a dangerous trick on his loyal coach Beppe. However, he soon realises that taking the legendary opera star Dame Bella Canto to the music festival wasn't the best idea.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 18
programme.desc: Max and Monty's antics on a construction site get them into trouble when they ignore the danger warning signs.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S23 - EP 19
programme.desc: After Thomas loses his voice, he must find a new way to pass on a very important message.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 43
programme.desc: In this aerial adventure the Go Jetters are on the Strait of Gibraltar, Southern Spain to follow a group of migrating baby stalks as they make their journey from Spain to Africa. The baby birds follow the grown-ups so they know where to go, and then they remember the way for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 44
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are on Whistler Mountain in Canada doing some skiing and checking out the amazing cable car which runs high up between the mountains.

programme.title: Go Jetters S02 - EP 45
programme.desc: After watching a solar eclipse, the team head into space to fix the biggest glitch yet!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jackson's big blue 'chicken' Ludwig (who definitely isn't a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them - the chase is on!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: Preston needs to knock down his shed, and Mojo has the wrecking ball to do it. But first, Mojo and Bo have to get it all the way across town, which is harder than it sounds!

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Supertato and Evil Pea team up to find treasure, but she tricks him to get it for herself.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Supertato is determined to rescue Tomato's precious jewel after Evil Pea steals it.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Evil Pea swaps Supertato's Tato-Belt with her own evil Baddie-Belt.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 17
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping. They need to find somewhere to pitch their tent but it's not as easy as they thought it would be. They all work together and finally get settled. Then things start to unravel when the squirrels hear a scary noise outside the tent. What can it be? All sorts of things are imagined. DUGGEE!!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 18
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 19
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 20
programme.desc: It's one of those days. The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit ... hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let’s play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 39
programme.desc: A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 41
programme.desc: When Indy and Rusty play Mums and Dads, they can't agree on who should go to work, so they part company. Indy has a hard time finding a babysitter, while Bluey makes Rusty her baby.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 42
programme.desc: It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout jet off in the Explorer to Singapore on a global adventure to help guide a smooth-coated otter family back to the safety of a nearby river.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to explore the Okavango Delta in Botswana, Africa, in search of hippos. Along the way, Andy meets a giraffe, hitches a ride with an oxpecker and gets stuck in the mud with fighting hippos.

programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping. They need to find somewhere to pitch their tent but it's not as easy as they thought it would be. programme.title: Hey Duggee S02 - EP 18
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 41
programme.desc: When Indy and Rusty play Mums and Dads, they can't agree on who should go to work, so they part company. Indy has a hard time finding a babysitter, while Bluey makes Rusty her baby.

programme.desc: It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout jet off in the Explorer to Singapore on a global adventure to help guide a smooth-coated otter family back to the safety of a nearby river.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to explore the Okavango Delta in Botswana, Africa, in search of hippos. Along the way, Andy meets a giraffe, hitches a ride with an oxpecker and gets stuck in the mud with fighting hippos.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, a bit exasperated, he explains that he was miming. They want to know what miming is, and Duggee fondly recalls his days as a young Parisian street performer. The Squirrels are keen to learn how to mime, and Duggee runs them through the basics.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 6
programme.desc: All the Squirrels are having a fine old time playing with the hose. All except one, poor Tag whose feet hurt. 'Why do my feet hurt?', he asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's news time at the Clubhouse, and the Squirrels share their exciting news of the week with each other. Happy got a new bath sponge, Norrie is growing a sunflower and Roly, after thinking hard if he's got any news at all, remembers he's getting a new brother or sister. The Squirrels have all sorts of questions to ask.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing outside, when out of a bush jumps the cutest creature they ever did see. They think it is simply adorable and tell it so... with startling results. The creature bursts into tears! The creature, whose name is Plinky, tells them her whole family are monsters, and that's what she's supposed to be, but she just cannot get the hang of it. The Squirrels are keen to help Plinky get in touch with her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 9
programme.desc: The day starts when Duggee moves a cupboard, and the Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind it. It's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels aren't sure what a diary is, so Duggee explains by reading some extracts. The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.
